text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, but may I step outside for some
air? I need to feel the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, but may I step outside for some
air? I need to feel the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's all right, Trainer. I don't want to
inconvenience you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Why is that? This loss was my fault and mine
alone.
choice_data_list:
It's a long journey to the top. Everyone needs a
leg up now and then.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Point taken. I'll keep climbing, so would you lend
me your strength, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's hair ripples in the breeze as we
discuss what led to today's defeat.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I would prefer to be somewhere else if possible.
I know it's a selfish request.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
After all the times I've returned to this room
following a loss... just the sight of it fills me with
frustration.
choice_data_list: That's exactly why we should stay.
That's exactly why we should stay.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: You have to confront that feeling.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Not doing so would be running away.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I will face this frustration now so that I
may prevent it from befalling me again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Grass Wonder and I evaluate
everything that went wrong in today's race.
